name: Kids' sports Bamboo Melamine Plate - Pillowfort™
description: Create a sports-themed dining setting for your kid with the Sports Bamboo Melamine Plate from Pillowfort™. This round plate features basketball, baseball, other ball prints, and a flag print for a fun look. Made of bamboo melamine, this plate is BPA-free to make it great for everyday use, and it is dishwasher-safe for easy cleanup after use.
